verses.latin_vulgate: Misericordias Domini in æternum cantabo ;  in generationem et generationem annuntiabo veritatem tuam in ore meo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חַֽסְדֵ֣י יְ֭הֹוָה עוֹלָ֣ם אָשִׁ֑ירָה לְדֹ֥ר וָדֹ֓ר ׀ אוֹדִ֖יעַ אֱמוּנָתְךָ֣ בְּפִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The mercies of the Lord I will sing for ever. I will shew forth thy truth with my mouth to generation and generation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Etanin sen Esrahilaisen opetus. (H89:2) Minä veisaan Herran armoja ijankaikkisesti, ja ilmoitan sinun totuuttas suullani suvusta sukuun,
verses.king_james: I will sing of the mercies of the Lord for ever: with my mouth will I make known thy faithfulness to all generations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam dixisti : In æternum misericordia ædificabitur in cælis ;  præparabitur veritas tua in eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־אָמַ֗רְתִּי ע֭וֹלָם חֶ֣סֶד יִבָּנֶ֑ה שָׁמַ֓יִם ׀ תָּכִ֖ן אֱמוּנָתְךָ֣ בָהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: For thou hast said: Mercy shall be built up for ever in the heavens: thy truth shall be prepared in them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanon: ijankaikkinen armo käy ylös: sinä pidät uskollisesti totuutes taivaissa.
verses.king_james: For I have said, Mercy shall be built up for ever: thy faithfulness shalt thou establish in the very heavens.

verses.latin_vulgate: Disposui testamentum electis meis ;  juravi David servo meo :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כָּרַ֣תִּי בְ֭רִית לִבְחִירִ֑י נִ֝שְׁבַּ֗עְתִּי לְדָוִ֥ד עַבְדִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I have made a covenant with my elect: I have sworn to David my servant:
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä olen liiton tehnyt valittuini kanssa: minä olen vannonut Davidille palvelialleni:
verses.king_james: I have made a covenant with my chosen, I have sworn unto David my servant,

verses.latin_vulgate: Usque in æternum præparabo semen tuum,  et ædificabo in generationem et generationem sedem tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַד־ע֭וֹלָם אָכִ֣ין זַרְעֶ֑ךָ וּבָנִ֨יתִי לְדֹר־וָד֖וֹר כִּסְאֲךָ֣ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thy seed will I settle for ever. And I will build up thy throne unto generation and generation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hamaan ijankaikkisuuteen vahvistan minä sinun siemenes, ja rakennan sinun istuimes suvusta sukuun, Sela!
verses.king_james: Thy seed will I establish for ever, and build up thy throne to all generations. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confitebuntur cæli mirabilia tua, Domine ;  etenim veritatem tuam in ecclesia sanctorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְי֘וֹד֤וּ שָׁמַ֣יִם פִּלְאֲךָ֣ יְהֹוָ֑ה אַף־אֱ֝מ֥וּנָתְךָ֗ בִּקְהַ֥ל קְדֹשִֽׁים׃
verses.douay_rheims: The heavens shall confess thy wonders, O Lord: and thy truth in the church of the saints.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja taivaat pitää ylistämän, Herra, sinun ihmeitäs, niin myös totuuttas pyhäin seurakunnassa.
verses.king_james: And the heavens shall praise thy wonders, O Lord: thy faithfulness also in the congregation of the saints.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam quis in nubibus æquabitur Domino ;  similis erit Deo in filiis Dei ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י מִ֣י בַ֭שַּׁחַק יַעֲרֹ֣ךְ לַיהֹוָ֑ה יִדְמֶ֥ה לַ֝יהֹוָ֗ה בִּבְנֵ֥י אֵלִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: For who in the clouds can be compared to the Lord: or who among the sons of God shall be like to God?
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä kuka taidetaan pilvissä verrattaa Herraan? ja kuka on Herran kaltainen jumalain lasten seassa?
verses.king_james: For who in the heaven can be compared unto the Lord? who among the sons of the mighty can be likened unto the Lord?

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus, qui glorificatur in consilio sanctorum,  magnus et terribilis super omnes qui in circuitu ejus sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֣ל נַ֭עֲרָץ בְּסוֹד־קְדֹשִׁ֣ים רַבָּ֑ה וְ֝נוֹרָ֗א עַל־כׇּל־סְבִיבָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: God, who is glorified in the assembly of the saints: great and terrible above all them that are about him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumala on sangen väkevä pyhäinsä kokouksissa, ja ihmeellinen kaikkein seassa, jotka ovat hänen ympärillänsä.
verses.king_james: God is greatly to be feared in the assembly of the saints, and to be had in reverence of all them that are about him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domine Deus virtutum, quis similis tibi ?  potens es, Domine, et veritas tua in circuitu tuo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֤ה ׀ אֱלֹ֘הֵ֤י צְבָא֗וֹת מִי־כָמ֖וֹךָֽ חֲסִ֥ין ׀ יָ֑הּ וֶ֝אֱמ֥וּנָתְךָ֗ סְבִיבוֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: O Lord God of hosts, who is like to thee? thou art mighty, O Lord, and thy truth is round about thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra Jumala Zebaot, kuka on niinkuin sinä, väkevä Jumala? ja sinun totuutes on sinun ympärilläs.
verses.king_james: O Lord God of hosts, who is a strong Lord like unto thee? or to thy faithfulness round about thee?

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu dominaris potestati maris ;  motum autem fluctuum ejus tu mitigas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַתָּ֣ה מ֭וֹשֵׁל בְּגֵא֣וּת הַיָּ֑ם בְּשׂ֥וֹא גַ֝לָּ֗יו אַתָּ֥ה תְשַׁבְּחֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou rulest the power of the sea: and appeasest the motion of the waves thereof.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä vallitset pauhaavaisen meren: sinä hillitset paisuvaiset aallot.
verses.king_james: Thou rulest the raging of the sea: when the waves thereof arise, thou stillest them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu humiliasti, sicut vulneratum, superbum ;  in brachio virtutis tuæ dispersisti inimicos tuos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַתָּ֤ה דִכִּ֣אתָ כֶחָלָ֣ל רָ֑הַב בִּזְר֥וֹעַ עֻ֝זְּךָ֗ פִּזַּ֥רְתָּ אוֹיְבֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast humbled the proud one, as one that is slain: with the arm of thy strength thou hast scattered thy enemies.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä lyöt Rahabin kuoliaaksi: sinä hajoitat vihollises urhoollisella käsivarrellas.
verses.king_james: Thou hast broken Rahab in pieces, as one that is slain; thou hast scattered thine enemies with thy strong arm.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tui sunt cæli, et tua est terra :  orbem terræ, et plenitudinem ejus tu fundasti ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְךָ֣ שָׁ֭מַיִם אַף־לְךָ֥ אָ֑רֶץ תֵּבֵ֥ל וּ֝מְלֹאָ֗הּ אַתָּ֥ה יְסַדְתָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thine are the heavens, and thine is the earth: the world and the fulness thereof thou hast founded:
verses.finnish_biblia: Taivaat ovat sinun, maa myös on sinun: sinä olet perustanut maan piirin, ja mitä siinä on.
verses.king_james: The heavens are thine, the earth also is thine: as for the world and the fulness thereof, thou hast founded them.

verses.latin_vulgate: aquilonem et mare tu creasti.  Thabor et Hermon in nomine tuo exsultabunt :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צָפ֣וֹן וְ֭יָמִין אַתָּ֣ה בְרָאתָ֑ם תָּב֥וֹר וְ֝חֶרְמ֗וֹן בְּשִׁמְךָ֥ יְרַנֵּֽנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The north and the sea thou hast created. Thabor and Hermon shall rejoice in thy name:
verses.finnish_biblia: Pohjan ja etelän olet sinä luonut: Tabor ja Hermon kiittävät sinun nimeäs.
verses.king_james: The north and the south thou hast created them: Tabor and Hermon shall rejoice in thy name.

verses.latin_vulgate: tuum brachium cum potentia.  Firmetur manus tua, et exaltetur dextera tua :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְךָ֣ זְ֭רוֹעַ עִם־גְּבוּרָ֑ה תָּעֹ֥ז יָ֝דְךָ֗ תָּר֥וּם יְמִינֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thy arm is with might. Let thy hand be strengthened, and thy right hand exalted:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinulla on voimallinen käsivarsi: väkevä on sinun kätes, ja korkia on oikia kätes.
verses.king_james: Thou hast a mighty arm: strong is thy hand, and high is thy right hand.

verses.latin_vulgate: justitia et judicium præparatio sedis tuæ :  misericordia et veritas præcedent faciem tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צֶ֣דֶק וּ֭מִשְׁפָּט מְכ֣וֹן כִּסְאֶ֑ךָ חֶ֥סֶד וֶ֝אֱמֶ֗ת יְֽקַדְּמ֥וּ פָנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Justice and judgment are the preparation of thy throne. Mercy and truth shall go before thy face:
verses.finnish_biblia: Vanhurskaus ja tuomio on istuimes vahvistus: armo ja totuus ovat sinun kasvois edessä.
verses.king_james: Justice and judgment are the habitation of thy throne: mercy and truth shall go before thy face.

verses.latin_vulgate: Beatus populus qui scit jubilationem :  Domine, in lumine vultus tui ambulabunt,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַשְׁרֵ֣י הָ֭עָם יֹדְעֵ֣י תְרוּעָ֑ה יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה בְּֽאוֹר־פָּנֶ֥יךָ יְהַלֵּכֽוּן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed is the people that knoweth jubilation. They shall walk, O Lord, in the light of thy countenance:
verses.finnish_biblia: Autuas on se kansa, joka ihastua taitaa: Herra, heidän pitää vaeltaman sinun kasvois valkeudessa.
verses.king_james: Blessed is the people that know the joyful sound: they shall walk, O Lord, in the light of thy countenance.

verses.latin_vulgate: et in nomine tuo exsultabunt tota die,  et in justitia tua exaltabuntur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּ֭שִׁמְךָ יְגִיל֣וּן כׇּל־הַיּ֑וֹם וּבְצִדְקָתְךָ֥ יָרֽוּמוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And in thy name they shall rejoice all the day, and in thy justice they shall be exalted.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heidän pitää iloitseman joka päivä sinun nimestäs, ja sinun vanhurskaudessas kunnialliset oleman.
verses.king_james: In thy name shall they rejoice all the day: and in thy righteousness shall they be exalted.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam gloria virtutis eorum tu es,  et in beneplacito tuo exaltabitur cornu nostrum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־תִפְאֶ֣רֶת עֻזָּ֣מוֹ אָ֑תָּה וּ֝בִרְצוֹנְךָ֗ (תרים) [תָּר֥וּם] קַרְנֵֽינוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For thou art the glory of their strength: and in thy good pleasure shall our horn be exalted.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä sinä olet heidän väkevyytensä kerskaus, ja sinun armos kautta nostat sinä ylös meidän sarvemme.
verses.king_james: For thou art the glory of their strength: and in thy favour our horn shall be exalted.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia Domini est assumptio nostra,  et sancti Israël regis nostri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י לַ֭יהֹוָה מָגִנֵּ֑נוּ וְלִקְד֖וֹשׁ יִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל מַלְכֵּֽנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For our protection is of the Lord, and of our king the holy one of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Herra on meidän kilpemme, ja pyhä Israelissa on meidän kuninkaamme.
verses.king_james: For the Lord is our defence; and the Holy One of Israel is our king.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc locutus es in visione sanctis tuis,  et dixisti : Posui adjutorium in potente,  et exaltavi electum de plebe mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֤ז דִּבַּ֥רְתָּֽ־בְחָז֡וֹן לַחֲסִידֶ֗יךָ וַתֹּ֗אמֶר שִׁוִּ֣יתִי עֵ֭זֶר עַל־גִּבּ֑וֹר הֲרִימ֖וֹתִי בָח֣וּר מֵעָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then thou spokest in a vision to thy saints, and saidst: I have laid help upon one that is mighty, and have exalted one chosen out of my people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin sinä puhuit näyissä pyhilles ja sanoit: minä olen sankarin herättänyt auttamaan: minä olen korottanut valitun kansasta.
verses.king_james: Then thou spakest in vision to thy holy one, and saidst, I have laid help upon one that is mighty; I have exalted one chosen out of the people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inveni David, servum meum ;  oleo sancto meo unxi eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מָ֭צָאתִי דָּוִ֣ד עַבְדִּ֑י בְּשֶׁ֖מֶן קׇדְשִׁ֣י מְשַׁחְתִּֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: I have found David my servant: with my holy oil I have anointed him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä olen löytänyt palveliani Davidin: minä olen hänen voidellut pyhällä öljylläni.
verses.king_james: I have found David my servant; with my holy oil have I anointed him:

verses.latin_vulgate: Manus enim mea auxiliabitur ei,  et brachium meum confortabit eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁ֣ר יָ֭דִי תִּכּ֣וֹן עִמּ֑וֹ אַף־זְרוֹעִ֥י תְאַמְּצֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For my hand shall help him: and my arm shall strengthen him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun käteni tukee häntä, ja minun käsivarteni vahvistaa häntä.
verses.king_james: With whom my hand shall be established: mine arm also shall strengthen him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nihil proficiet inimicus in eo,  et filius iniquitatis non apponet nocere ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־יַשִּׁ֣יא אוֹיֵ֣ב בּ֑וֹ וּבֶן־עַ֝וְלָ֗ה לֹ֣א יְעַנֶּֽנּוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The enemy shall have no advantage over him: nor the son of iniquity have power to hurt him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei pidä viholliset häntä voittaman, ja väärät ei pidä häntä sulloman.
verses.king_james: The enemy shall not exact upon him; nor the son of wickedness afflict him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et concidam a facie ipsius inimicos ejus,  et odientes eum in fugam convertam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכַתּוֹתִ֣י מִפָּנָ֣יו צָרָ֑יו וּמְשַׂנְאָ֥יו אֶגּֽוֹף׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will cut down his enemies before his face; and them that hate him I will put to flight.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan minä lyön hänen vihollisensa hänen edestänsä; ja niitä, jotka häntä vihaavat, tahdon minä vaivata.
verses.king_james: And I will beat down his foes before his face, and plague them that hate him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et veritas mea et misericordia mea cum ipso,  et in nomine meo exaltabitur cornu ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וֶ֥אֱֽמוּנָתִ֣י וְחַסְדִּ֣י עִמּ֑וֹ וּ֝בִשְׁמִ֗י תָּר֥וּם קַרְנֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And my truth and my mercy shall be with him: and in my name shall his horn be exalted.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minun totuuteni ja armoni pitää hänen tykönänsä oleman, ja hänen sarvensa pitää minun nimeeni nostettaman ylös.
verses.king_james: But my faithfulness and my mercy shall be with him: and in my name shall his horn be exalted.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ponam in mari manum ejus,  et in fluminibus dexteram ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׂמְתִּ֣י בַיָּ֣ם יָד֑וֹ וּֽבַנְּהָר֥וֹת יְמִינֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will set his hand in the sea; and his right hand in the rivers.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä asetan hänen kätensä mereen, ja hänen oikian kätensä virtoihin.
verses.king_james: I will set his hand also in the sea, and his right hand in the rivers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipse invocabit me : Pater meus es tu,  Deus meus, et susceptor salutis meæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֣וּא יִ֭קְרָאֵנִי אָ֣בִי אָ֑תָּה אֵ֝לִ֗י וְצ֣וּר יְשׁוּעָתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: He shall cry out to me: Thou art my father: my God, and the support of my salvation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Näin hänen pitää minun kutsuman: sinä olet minun Isäni, Jumalani ja turvani, joka minua auttaa.
verses.king_james: He shall cry unto me, Thou art my father, my God, and the rock of my salvation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ego primogenitum ponam illum,  excelsum præ regibus terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַף־אָ֭נִי בְּכ֣וֹר אֶתְּנֵ֑הוּ עֶ֝לְי֗וֹן לְמַלְכֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will make him my firstborn, high above the kings of the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä asetan hänen esikoiseksi, kaikkein korkeimmaksi kuningasten seassa maan päällä.
verses.king_james: Also I will make him my firstborn, higher than the kings of the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: In æternum servabo illi misericordiam meam,  et testamentum meum fidele ipsi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְ֭עוֹלָם (אשמור) [אֶשְׁמׇר־]ל֣וֹ חַסְדִּ֑י וּ֝בְרִיתִ֗י נֶאֱמֶ֥נֶת לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will keep my mercy for him for ever: and my covenant faithful to him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä pidän hänelle armoni tähteellä ijankaikkisesti, ja minun liittoni pitää hänelle vahva oleman.
verses.king_james: My mercy will I keep for him for evermore, and my covenant shall stand fast with him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ponam in sæculum sæculi semen ejus,  et thronum ejus sicut dies cæli.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׂמְתִּ֣י לָעַ֣ד זַרְע֑וֹ וְ֝כִסְא֗וֹ כִּימֵ֥י שָׁמָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will make his seed to endure for evermore: and his throne as the days of heaven.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä annan hänelle ijankaikkisen siemenen, ja vahvistan hänen istuimensa niinkauvan kuin taivaat pysyvät.
verses.king_james: His seed also will I make to endure for ever, and his throne as the days of heaven.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si autem dereliquerint filii ejus legem meam,  et in judiciis meis non ambulaverint ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־יַעַזְב֣וּ בָ֭נָיו תּוֹרָתִ֑י וּ֝בְמִשְׁפָּטַ֗י לֹ֣א יֵלֵכֽוּן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And if his children forsake my law, and walk not in my judgments:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta jos hänen lapsensa minun lakini hylkäävät, ja ei vaella minun oikeudessani,
verses.king_james: If his children forsake my law, and walk not in my judgments;

verses.latin_vulgate: si justitias meas profanaverint,  et mandata mea non custodierint :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־חֻקֹּתַ֥י יְחַלֵּ֑לוּ וּ֝מִצְוֺתַ֗י לֹ֣א יִשְׁמֹֽרוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: If they profane my justices: and keep not my commandments:
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos he minun säätyni turmelevat, ja ei minun käskyjäni pidä;
verses.king_james: If they break my statutes, and keep not my commandments;

verses.latin_vulgate: visitabo in virga iniquitates eorum,  et in verberibus peccata eorum ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּפָקַדְתִּ֣י בְשֵׁ֣בֶט פִּשְׁעָ֑ם וּבִנְגָעִ֥ים עֲוֺנָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will visit their iniquities with a rod and their sins with stripes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin minä heidän syntinsä vitsalla rankaisen, ja heidän pahat tekonsa haavoilla.
verses.king_james: Then will I visit their transgression with the rod, and their iniquity with stripes.

verses.latin_vulgate: misericordiam autem meam non dispergam ab eo,  neque nocebo in veritate mea,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְ֭חַסְדִּי לֹא־אָפִ֣יר מֵעִמּ֑וֹ וְלֹֽא־אֲ֝שַׁקֵּ֗ר בֶּאֱמוּנָתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: But my mercy I will not take away from him: nor will I suffer my truth to fail.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta armoani en minä hänestä käännä pois, enkä salli totuuteni vilpistellä.
verses.king_james: Nevertheless my lovingkindness will I not utterly take from him, nor suffer my faithfulness to fail.

verses.latin_vulgate: neque profanabo testamentum meum :  et quæ procedunt de labiis meis non faciam irrita.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹֽא־אֲחַלֵּ֥ל בְּרִיתִ֑י וּמוֹצָ֥א שְׂ֝פָתַ֗י לֹ֣א אֲשַׁנֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Neither will I profane my covenant: and the words that proceed from my mouth I will not make void.
verses.finnish_biblia: En minä riko liittoani, ja mitä minun suustani käynyt on, en minä muuta.
verses.king_james: My covenant will I not break, nor alter the thing that is gone out of my lips.

verses.latin_vulgate: Semel juravi in sancto meo, si David mentiar :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֭חַת נִשְׁבַּ֣עְתִּי בְקׇדְשִׁ֑י אִֽם־לְדָוִ֥ד אֲכַזֵּֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: Once have I sworn by my holiness: I will not lie unto David:
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä olen vihdoin vannonut pyhyyteni kautta: en minä Davidille valehtele.
verses.king_james: Once have I sworn by my holiness that I will not lie unto David.

verses.latin_vulgate: semen ejus in æternum manebit.  Et thronus ejus sicut sol in conspectu meo,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זַ֭רְעוֹ לְעוֹלָ֣ם יִהְיֶ֑ה וְכִסְא֖וֹ כַשֶּׁ֣מֶשׁ נֶגְדִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: His seed shall endure for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen siemenensä on oleva ijankaikkisesti, ja hänen istuimensa minun edessäni niinkuin aurinko.
verses.king_james: His seed shall endure for ever, and his throne as the sun before me.

verses.latin_vulgate: et sicut luna perfecta in æternum,  et testis in cælo fidelis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּ֭יָרֵחַ יִכּ֣וֹן עוֹלָ֑ם וְעֵ֥ד בַּ֝שַּׁ֗חַק נֶאֱמָ֥ן סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And his throne as the sun before me: and as the moon perfect for ever, and a faithful witness in heaven.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja niinkuin kuu, vahvistetaan se ijankaikkisesti, ja on vahvana niinkuin todistus pilvissä, Sela!
verses.king_james: It shall be established for ever as the moon, and as a faithful witness in heaven. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu vero repulisti et despexisti ;  distulisti christum tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֣ה זָ֭נַחְתָּ וַתִּמְאָ֑ס הִ֝תְעַבַּ֗רְתָּ עִם־מְשִׁיחֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But thou hast rejected and despised: thou hast been angry with my anointed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan nyt sinä syökset ja heität pois, ja vihastut voidellulles.
verses.king_james: But thou hast cast off and abhorred, thou hast been wroth with thine anointed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Evertisti testamentum servi tui ;  profanasti in terra sanctuarium ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נֵ֭אַרְתָּה בְּרִ֣ית עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ חִלַּ֖לְתָּ לָאָ֣רֶץ נִזְרֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast overthrown the covenant of thy servant: thou hast profaned his sanctuary on the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä särjet palvelias liiton, ja tallaat hänen kruununsa maahan.
verses.king_james: Thou hast made void the covenant of thy servant: thou hast profaned his crown by casting it to the ground.

verses.latin_vulgate: Destruxisti omnes sepes ejus ;  posuisti firmamentum ejus formidinem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פָּרַ֥צְתָּ כׇל־גְּדֵרֹתָ֑יו שַׂ֖מְתָּ מִבְצָרָ֣יו מְחִתָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast broken down all his hedges: thou hast made his strength fear.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä rikot hänen muurinsa, ja annat hänen linnansa särjettää.
verses.king_james: Thou hast broken down all his hedges; thou hast brought his strong holds to ruin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Diripuerunt eum omnes transeuntes viam ;  factus est opprobrium vicinis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שַׁ֭סֻּהוּ כׇּל־עֹ֣בְרֵי דָ֑רֶךְ הָיָ֥ה חֶ֝רְפָּ֗ה לִשְׁכֵנָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: All that pass by the way have robbed him: he is become a reproach to his neighbours.
verses.finnish_biblia: Häntä raatelevat kaikki ohitsekäyväiset: hän on tullut läsnäolevaisillensa nauruksi.
verses.king_james: All that pass by the way spoil him: he is a reproach to his neighbours.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exaltasti dexteram deprimentium eum ;  lætificasti omnes inimicos ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲ֭רִימוֹתָ יְמִ֣ין צָרָ֑יו הִ֝שְׂמַ֗חְתָּ כׇּל־אוֹיְבָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast set up the right hand of them that oppress him: thou hast made all his enemies to rejoice.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä korotat hänen vihollistensa oikian käden, ja ilahutat kaikki hänen vainollisensa.
verses.king_james: Thou hast set up the right hand of his adversaries; thou hast made all his enemies to rejoice.

verses.latin_vulgate: Avertisti adjutorium gladii ejus,  et non es auxiliatus ei in bello.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַף־תָּ֭שִׁיב צ֣וּר חַרְבּ֑וֹ וְלֹ֥א הֲ֝קֵימֹת֗וֹ בַּמִּלְחָמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast turned away the help of his sword; and hast not assisted him in battle.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen miekkansa voiman olet sinä myös ottanut pois, ja et salli hänen voittaa sodassa,
verses.king_james: Thou hast also turned the edge of his sword, and hast not made him to stand in the battle.

verses.latin_vulgate: Destruxisti eum ab emundatione,  et sedem ejus in terram collisisti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִשְׁבַּ֥תָּ מִטְּהָר֑וֹ וְ֝כִסְא֗וֹ לָאָ֥רֶץ מִגַּֽרְתָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast made his purification to cease: and thou hast cast his throne down to the ground.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä hävitit hänen puhtautensa, ja annoit hänen istuimensa kaatua maahan.
verses.king_james: Thou hast made his glory to cease, and cast his throne down to the ground.

verses.latin_vulgate: Minorasti dies temporis ejus ;  perfudisti eum confusione.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִ֭קְצַרְתָּ יְמֵ֣י עֲלוּמָ֑יו הֶ֥עֱטִ֨יתָ עָלָ֖יו בּוּשָׁ֣ה סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast shortened the days of his time: thou hast covered him with confusion.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä lyhennät hänen nuoruutensa ajat, ja peität hänen häpiällä, Sela!
verses.king_james: The days of his youth hast thou shortened: thou hast covered him with shame. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Usquequo, Domine, avertis in finem ?  exardescet sicut ignis ira tua ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַד־מָ֣ה יְ֭הֹוָה תִּסָּתֵ֣ר לָנֶ֑צַח תִּבְעַ֖ר כְּמוֹ־אֵ֣שׁ חֲמָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: How long, O Lord, turnest thou away unto the end? shall thy anger burn like fire?
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, kuinka kauvan sinä sinus niin salaat? ja annat hirmuisuutes palaa niinkuin tulen?
verses.king_james: How long, Lord? wilt thou hide thyself for ever? shall thy wrath burn like fire?

verses.latin_vulgate: Memorare quæ mea substantia :  numquid enim vane constituisti omnes filios hominum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זְכׇר־אֲנִ֥י מֶה־חָ֑לֶד עַל־מַה־שָּׁ֝֗וְא בָּרָ֥אתָ כׇל־בְּנֵֽי־אָדָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Remember what my substance is: for hast thou made all the children of men in vain?
verses.finnish_biblia: Muista, kuinka lyhyt minun elämäni on: miksis tahdoit kaikki ihmiset hukkaan luoda?
verses.king_james: Remember how short my time is: wherefore hast thou made all men in vain?

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis est homo qui vivet et non videbit mortem ?  eruet animam suam de manu inferi ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִ֤י גֶ֣בֶר יִֽ֭חְיֶה וְלֹ֣א יִרְאֶה־מָּ֑וֶת יְמַלֵּ֨ט נַפְשׁ֖וֹ מִיַּד־שְׁא֣וֹל סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who is the man that shall live, and not see death: that shall deliver his soul from the hand of hell?
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuka elää, ja ei näe kuolemaa? kuka sielunsa tuonelan käsistä pelastaa? Sela!
verses.king_james: What man is he that liveth, and shall not see death? shall he deliver his soul from the hand of the grave? Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ubi sunt misericordiæ tuæ antiquæ, Domine,  sicut jurasti David in veritate tua ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַיֵּ֤ה ׀ חֲסָדֶ֖יךָ הָרִאשֹׁנִ֥ים ׀ אֲדֹנָ֑י נִשְׁבַּ֥עְתָּ לְ֝דָוִ֗ד בֶּאֱמוּנָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Lord, where are thy ancient mercies, according to what thou didst swear to David in thy truth?
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, kussa ovat sinun entiset armos, jotkas Davidille vannonut olet totuudessas?
verses.king_james: Lord, where are thy former lovingkindnesses, which thou swarest unto David in thy truth?

verses.latin_vulgate: Memor esto, Domine, opprobrii servorum tuorum,  quod continui in sinu meo, multarum gentium :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זְכֹ֣ר אֲ֭דֹנָי חֶרְפַּ֣ת עֲבָדֶ֑יךָ שְׂאֵתִ֥י בְ֝חֵיקִ֗י כׇּל־רַבִּ֥ים עַמִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Be mindful, O Lord, of the reproach of thy servants (which I have held in my bosom) of many nations:
verses.finnish_biblia: Muista, Herra, palveliais pilkkaa, jonka minä kannan helmassani, kaikista niin monista kansoista,
verses.king_james: Remember, Lord, the reproach of thy servants; how I do bear in my bosom the reproach of all the mighty people;

verses.latin_vulgate: quod exprobraverunt inimici tui, Domine ;  quod exprobraverunt commutationem christi tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁ֤ר חֵרְפ֖וּ אוֹיְבֶ֥יךָ ׀ יְהֹוָ֑ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר חֵ֝רְפ֗וּ עִקְּב֥וֹת מְשִׁיחֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Wherewith thy enemies have reproached, O Lord; wherewith they have reproached the change of thy anointed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joilla, Herra, vihollises pilkkaavat, joilla he pilkkaavat voideltus askelia.
verses.king_james: Wherewith thine enemies have reproached, O Lord; wherewith they have reproached the footsteps of thine anointed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictus Dominus in æternum. Fiat, fiat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּר֖וּךְ יְהֹוָ֥ה לְעוֹלָ֗ם אָ֘מֵ֥ן ׀ וְאָמֵֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed be the Lord for evermore. So be it. So be it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiitetty olkoon Herra ijankaikkisesti, amen! ja amen!
verses.king_james: Blessed be the Lord for evermore. Amen, and Amen.
